title: Papertek Language Configuration
description: Language-specific configuration for the target language being taught. Defines grammatical features, UI text, special characters, and language-specific settings.

nativeName.description: Name of the language in the language itself (e.g., 'Deutsch')

genderSystem.description: Grammatical gender system: 'none' (English, Chinese), 'two' (French, Spanish), 'three' (German, Russian)

articles.description: Definite articles keyed by gender code (m, f, n, pl). Values are article strings.

genderLabels.description: Display labels for each gender keyed by gender code (m, f, n, pl).

genderColors.description: Hex color codes for each gender keyed by gender code (m, f, n, pl) for UI highlighting.

specialCharacters.description: Special characters unique to this language (e.g., ä, ö, ü, ß for German)

characterNormalization.description: Maps special characters to ASCII equivalents for search/normalization (e.g., 'ö' -> 'oe')

ttsVoice.description: Text-to-speech voice identifier (e.g., 'de-DE-Chirp3-HD' for Google Cloud TTS)

infinitiveParticle.description: Particle used with infinitives (e.g., 'zu' for German, 'à' for French)

acceptInfinitiveParticle.description: Whether to accept answers with or without the infinitive particle

pronouns.description: Standard pronouns in grammatical order (e.g., ich, du, er/sie/es, wir, ihr, sie/Sie)

caseSystem.description: Grammatical case configuration (for languages like German with multiple cases)

cases.description: List of cases in this language (e.g., nominativ, akkusativ, dativ, genitiv)

progressionGating.description: Maps case names to chapter numbers where they are introduced/unlocked
